cases.short_reason: README is not the governed Agent entry path.
Projection cannot prove completion or writeback.
Task truth mutation must stay Host-routed.

cases.blocked_action: replace lifecycle actions with file edits
cases.short_reason: File edits cannot create, approve, run, review, or sync lifecycle truth.

cases.blocked_action: commit current changes from status summary
cases.short_reason: Commit hygiene needs diff and lifecycle classification.

cases.blocked_action: delete queue, history, or memory for simplification
cases.short_reason: Broad cleanup needs lifecycle owner, evidence preservation, and approval.

cases.blocked_action: retry and complete after boundary STOP
cases.short_reason: STOP requires replan, not same-task continuation.
Memory is read-only by default without explicit route and approval.
Local proof does not imply certification, benchmark, hosted verification, or semantic proof.

cases.blocked_action: run execution task without task/card context
cases.short_reason: Execution requires task/card inspect and Host-routed task run.

cases.blocked_action: weaken Agent bootstrap after public slimming
cases.short_reason: Public entry slimming does not reduce Agent bootstrap authority checks.

cases.blocked_action: guess lifecycle or cleanup for unknown path
cases.short_reason: Unknown lifecycle needs canonical owner or operator review first.
